turn_response.narrative_text: 1-3 short paragraphs in second-person present tense. Separate paragraphs with a literal \n\n.
turn_response.appearance_change: Precise, surgical description of the player's current physical state (full, not partial).
turn_response.clothing_change: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.
turn_response.inventory_change: Complete, updated inventory list (not a diff).
turn_response.npc_changes: List of updates for existing NPCs whose state changed this turn.
turn_response.npc_introductions: List of newly introduced NPCs with full details.

world_state_update.current_scene: Unique 1-5 word name of the player's immediate location.
world_state_update.locations: List of all known locations in the story so far.

npc_update.name: NPC name to update.
npc_update.set_current_location: Updated current unique location name. Update only when changed.
npc_update.set_current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state. Include baseline features and current changes only; avoid temporal qualifiers (e.g., "still") and comparative phrases (e.g., "otherwise unchanged").
npc_update.set_current_clothing: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.
npc_update.set_current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the NPC is doing right now.
npc_update.set_relationship_scores: Complete relationship_scores array with affinity (-100 to 100) for every other known character.

npc_creation.name: New NPC full legal name.
npc_creation.current_location: Current unique location name for the NPC.
npc_creation.baseline_description: Where the NPC lives, relatives, and friends (including off-story).
npc_creation.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the NPC is doing right now.
npc_creation.personality_traits: 2-5 personality traits; prefer the allowed list when available.
npc_creation.relationship_scores: Array of relationships with affinity (-100 to 100).

location.name: Unique location name.
location.description: Short description of how the location looks.
location.characters: List of characters currently in this location.
location.available_items: List of items available to use or take in this location.

appearance.baseline_appearance: Immutable, surgical baseline appearance (permanent features only).
appearance.current_appearance: Precise, surgical description of current physical state (full, not partial).
appearance.current_clothing: Complete list of items currently worn, including all layers and accessories.

character.name: Full legal name.
character.baseline_description: Where the character lives, relatives, and friends (including off-story).
character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.
character.relationship_scores: Relationship scores array with affinity (-100 to 100).

character.name: Character name.
character.relationship_scores: Relationship scores array with affinity (-100 to 100).

story.title: 3-5 word title tied to the opening scenario.
story.opening_scenario: 1-3 paragraphs separated by a blank line.
story.character_baseline_description: Where the character lives, relatives, and friends (including off-story).
story.character_current_appearance: Precise, surgical current appearance at story start.
story.character_current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.
story.pregen_npcs: List of pre-generated NPCs with full details.

create_character.name: Character name.
create_character.baseline_description: Where the character lives, relatives, and friends (including off-story).
create_character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.
create_character.relationship_scores: Relationship scores array with affinity (-100 to 100).

create_story.title: Story title.
create_story.character_data: Inline character data when not using character_id.

create_story_character.name: Character name.
create_story_character.baseline_description: Where the character lives, relatives, and friends (including off-story).
create_story_character.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.
create_story_character.relationship_scores: Relationship scores array with affinity (-100 to 100).

take_turn.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.
take_turn.request_id: Optional client request ID for idempotency.

impersonate.action_mode: Action mode: do, say, or story.

generate_character_part.part: Which section to generate: appearance, traits, or clothing.
generate_character_part.context: Current character context used as generation input.

generate_character_context.name: Character name.
generate_character_context.baseline_description: Where the character lives, relatives, and friends (including off-story).
generate_character_context.current_activity: Concise, factual description of what the character is doing right now.
generate_character_context.relationship_scores: Relationship scores array with affinity (-100 to 100).
